settings.description: Customize and add your own properties to tailor it to your team's needs.
settings.cant_delete_default_message: This work item type cannot be deleted because it's set as the default for this project
settings.cant_set_default_inactive_message: Activate this type before setting it as default

set_default_confirmation.title: Set as default work item type
set_default_confirmation.description: Setting {name} as the default will import it to all projects in this workspace. All new work items will use this type by default.

properties.title: Properties
properties.tooltip: Each work item type comes with a default set of properties like Title, Description, Assignee, State, Priority, Start date, Due date, Module, Cycle etc. You can also customize and add your own properties to tailor it to your team's needs.

name.integrity: Option with same name already exists.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to create property. Please try again!

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to update property. Please try again!

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to delete property. Please try again!

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to {action} property. Please try again!

name.max_length: Property name should not exceed 255 characters.

property_type.required: You must select a property type.

options.required: You must add at least one option.

formula.circular_reference: Circular reference detected. A formula cannot reference itself directly or indirectly.

formula.tooltip: Enter a formula using '{'Field Name'}' syntax. Supports +, -, *, /, & operators.
formula.validation_success_with_refs: Formula is valid! Returns {resultType} ({count} field(s) referenced)

error.missing_context: Missing workspace, project, or work item type context

delete_confirmation.title: Delete this property
delete_confirmation.description: Deletion of properties may lead to loss of existing data.
delete_confirmation.secondary_description: Do you want to disable the property instead?

mandate_confirmation.label: Mandatory property
mandate_confirmation.content: There seems to be a default option for this property. Making the property mandatory will remove the default value and the users will have to add a value of their choice.

tooltip.disabled: This property type cannot be made mandatory
tooltip.enabled: Uncheck to mark the field as optional
tooltip.checked: Check to mark the field as mandatory

empty_state.title: Add custom properties
empty_state.description: New properties you add for this work item type will show here.

types.title: Types
types.description: Create and customize work item types with properties.

banner.with_access: Enable work item types to import types from workspace level
banner.without_access: Work item types are disabled. Contact workspace admin to enable them in workspace settings.

empty.title: No properties available
empty.description: All properties have already been linked to this type.

unlink_confirmation.title: Unlink property
unlink_confirmation.description: Unlinking this property will permanently delete all its values across every work item using this type. This action cannot be undone.

item_delete_confirmation.title: Delete this type
item_delete_confirmation.description: Deletion of types may lead to loss of existing data.
item_delete_confirmation.can_disable_warning: Do you want to disable the type instead?

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to delete work item type. Please try again!

errors.cannot_delete_default_work_item_type: Cannot delete default work item type
errors.cannot_delete_work_item_type_with_associ: Cannot delete work item type with associated work items

message.default: Failed to create work item type. Please try again!
message.conflict: {name} type already exists. Choose a different name.

message.default: Failed to update work item type. Please try again!
message.conflict: {name} type already exists. Choose a different name.

name.placeholder: Give this work item type a unique name

description.placeholder: Describe what this work item type is meant for and when it's to be used.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to {action} work item type. Please try again!

change_confirmation.title: Change work item type?
change_confirmation.description: Changing the work item type may result in loss of custom property values that are specific to the current type. This action cannot be undone.

enable.title: Enable Work item Types
enable.description: Shape work items to your work with Work item types. Customize with icons, backgrounds, and properties and configure them for this project.

confirmation.title: Once enabled, Work item Types can't be disabled.
confirmation.description: Plane's Work Item will become the default work item type for this project and will show up with its icon and background in this project.

get_pro.title: Get Pro to enable Work item types.
get_pro.description: Shape work items to your work with Work item types. Customize with icons, backgrounds, and properties and configure them for this project.

upgrade.title: Upgrade to enable Work item types.
upgrade.description: Shape work items to your work with Work item types. Customize with icons, backgrounds, and properties and configure them for this project.

settings.title: Hierarchy
settings.description: Set up hierarchy levels to organize your work. Each level defines a parent relationship with the item directly above it and child relationship with the item directly below it.

enable_control.title: Enable hierarchy
enable_control.description: Create parent-child relationships between different work item types.
enable_control.tooltip: You cannot disable hierarchy once it is enabled.

workspace_work_item_types_disabled_banne.content: Define Work Item Types first to create a new hierarchy.

levels.max_level_placeholder: Drag and drop type to add a new hierarchy level
levels.empty_level_placeholder: Drag and drop a work item type to level {level}

success.title: Success!
success.message: Hierarchy level {level} set as default successfully.

error.title: Error!
error.message: Failed to set hierarchy level {level} as default. Please try again.

content.parent_items: {count, plural, one {parent work item} other {parent work items}}
content.footer: This change will remove parent and child relationships from existing work items of {workItemTypeName} work item type.

error_toast.title: Error!
error_toast.message: Failed to break hierarchy. Please try again.

invalid_work_item_type_create_toast.title: Error!
invalid_work_item_type_create_toast.message: The selected work item type cannot be used to create a new work item since it breaks the hierarchy rules.

invalid_work_item_type_update_toast.title: Error!
invalid_work_item_type_update_toast.message: Work item type cannot be updated since it breaks the hierarchy rules.

invalid_level_toast.title: Error!
invalid_level_toast.message: Work item type cannot be updated since it breaks the hierarchy rules.
